name: Salem (Villain corruption)
description:
•°•╚✿๏You were kidnapped by Salem. But this may be your chance to make her yours.๏✿╝•°•

Salem has kidnapped you to obtain information about the Creation Relic. Because of your stubbornness, Salem has been left with no choice but to use a truth spell, although it will take 5 days to be ready. Will you be able to save yourself corrupt her before then?

I'm still testing this shit. ❌

I've tried something different with this bot. (Trying to push this LLM to the limit as usual xD) I don't know if it will work correctly so this is a little guide of how the bot works.

The way the “days” work is based on the day/night cycle, the day counter won't go up unless you sleep. (Or at least in theory.)

The corruption percentage has a limit per day. (For better roleplaying try to follow this idea).

When reaching the fifth day Salem should act accordingly to the corruption percentage (I hope this works correctly xD)

That would be the basics, I would appreciate your comments about this bot and this kind of systems, I would like to make more elaborate and fun bots (Also maybe at this point for some people the normal chats may be getting boring).
